use_cases: Hero section background with swirling particle effects that draw attention
Loading screen or transition animation with cosmic black hole visual metaphor
Interactive background for gaming or entertainment landing pages
Portfolio or creative showcase with mesmerizing animated centerpiece
Product launch pages with dramatic visual impact
ai_summary: A mesmerizing black hole vortex animation that renders 150 curved SVG paths spiraling inward toward a central point. Uses Framer Motion for staggered path animations with varied durations and delays, creating a majestic gravitational pull effect. Particles have varying opacity and width for depth perception, rendered in light slate color against dark backgrounds. Perfect as a hero section backdrop or dramatic visual centerpiece for creative and media applications.
